title: Day 02 Resources
description: Official docs for state, forms, and TypeScript props — read after building.

resources.title: React — State: A Component's Memory
resources.description: Official useState introduction with mental model for re-renders.

resources.title: React — Passing Props to a Component
resources.description: How props flow and how to destructure them — builds on Day 01.

resources.title: React — Responding to Events
resources.description: Event handlers, preventDefault, and typing patterns for forms.

resources.title: React — Manipulating the DOM with Refs (Controlled vs Uncontrolled context)
resources.description: Read the contrast between controlling inputs with state vs refs.

resources.title: TypeScript — Object Types
resources.description: Interfaces, type aliases, and optional properties for form types.

resources.title: MDN — Spread syntax
resources.description: Spread for objects and arrays — foundation for immutable state updates.

resources.title: MDN — Rest parameters and spread
resources.description: Rest in destructuring — omitting sensitive fields before logging.

resources.title: React TypeScript Cheatsheet — Forms and Events
resources.description: Copy-paste-safe event types for inputs and forms.
